channel.title: Extensions on Documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Extensions on Documentation

item.title: Import and Export Designs
item.description:
Import and Export Designs

Meshery supports two primary operations for working with designs: Import and Export. A design in Meshery is a structured model describing how various components (e.g., Kubernetes manifests, Helm charts, or Docker Compose objects) should be managed and deployed. This document details the core concepts, the import/export processes, and the available methods to perform them.

Core Operations

Meshery treats each design as a combination of:

item.title: kubectl MeshSync Snapshot
item.description:
kubectl MeshSync Snapshot

A kubectl plugin for performing an ad hoc collection of resource information from a Kubernetes cluster and sending the cluster resources details to a Meshery Server. kubectl meshsync snapshot is a native kubectl plugin for conveniently synchronizing the state of your cluster with Meshery Server.

About Meshery Extensions

Meshery Extensions are plugins or add-ons that enhance the functionality of the Meshery platform beyond its core capabilities. Meshery supports different types of extensions (docs):
